overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic billboards, and futuristic architecture. The character crosses streets and walks along sidewalks in what appears to be Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, with heavy neon lighting and sparse pedestrian traffic.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a street crossing on yellow crosswalk markings, then transitions to walking along an orange textured sidewalk. The camera turns right around a distinctive curved building with a metallic facade, passing under an overhead pedestrian bridge while neon billboards glow in the background.

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a busy intersection, waiting for traffic to pass while standing next to a female pedestrian. After several vehicles including a black sedan drive through, the character crosses the wide intersection, leaving the curved building behind and approaching the opposite sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk lined with vibrant neon storefronts and advertisements, the camera passes a red-lit club entrance and an 'EEZY BEEFZ' billboard. The massive 'EL GUAPO' billboard dominates the view ahead as the character approaches an overpass structure, with graffiti-covered walls on the left and the street railing on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a metallic architectural corner through a bustling intersection and into a dense corridor of neon commercial signage. It begins by crossing yellow street markings and moving along an orange textured sidewalk, turning right around a curved metallic building and passing beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. As the camera reaches a busy intersection, it pauses beside a pedestrian to wait for a stream of vehicles, including a black sedan, before crossing the wide road toward the opposite sidewalk. The scene then shifts into a narrow pedestrian path lined with vibrant storefronts, passing a red-lit club entrance and an EEZY BEEFZ advertisement. Finally, the view is dominated by a massive EL GUAPO billboard as the camera approaches an overpass structure flanked by graffiti-covered walls and a street railing.
